summary: Iteration 3 testing complete. All 4 new placeholder pages (Tedarikçiler, Raporlar, İskonto hesabı, Entegrasyonlar) are fully implemented and working. All 53 backend tests pass (30 original + 6 CSV + 17 new iteration 3 tests). Frontend features tested successfully including supplier CRUD, CSV upload, reports with charts, discount calculator, and integrations page.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility improvement (minor)

critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED: Email sending in POST /api/orders/{id}/send still mocked (returns email_sent=false, mock=true)
All 4 placeholder pages now fully implemented - ComingSoon page no longer used
Sidebar shows all 8 nav items under 'Ana menü' without 'Yakında' or 'TASLAK' badges
seed_data_creation: Demo workspace with 50 products, 3 suppliers, discount rule (5000-10000₺ → 3.5%) auto-seeded
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 completed all P0 placeholder screens. All 4 new pages working: Tedarikçiler (CRUD + CSV upload), Raporlar (charts + CSV export), İskonto (calculator + rules CRUD), Entegrasyonlar (static cards). Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/ cover full API including new endpoints. Email sending still mocked.

new_backend_features: GET /api/reports/monthly-savings - returns 6 buckets with month, label, total_amount, total_saving, order_count ✓
GET /api/reports/category-distribution - returns array sorted by amount desc with category, qty, amount, percentage ✓
GET /api/reports/orders-csv - returns CSV with Content-Disposition attachment header ✓
DELETE /api/suppliers/{id} - admin only, removes supplier and related prices; staff gets 403 ✓
POST /api/supplier-prices/csv?supplier_id=X - upserts prices, returns not_found for invalid GTINs ✓
POST /api/discount-rules - admin only creates rule; staff gets 403 ✓
new_frontend_features: /tedarikci - Suppliers table with all columns (Ad, İletişim, Sipariş yöntemi, Fiyat listesi, Durum) ✓
/tedarikci - [data-testid=supplier-add-btn] opens create modal, form submission creates supplier with toast ✓
/tedarikci - Edit button opens prefilled modal, PATCH updates row ✓
/tedarikci - Upload icon opens 'Fiyat listesi yükle' dialog with template download and file input ✓
/tedarikci - Admin delete button opens AlertDialog, confirming removes supplier ✓
/raporlar - 3 stat cards (Toplam ciro, Toplam tasarruf, Toplam sipariş) ✓
/raporlar - Bar chart renders with recharts showing monthly savings ✓
/raporlar - Category distribution with progress bars and percentages ✓
/iskonto - Supplier select and revenue input for calculator ✓
/iskonto - Result panel shows discount percentage, ciro, iskonto tutarı, net tutar ✓
/iskonto - Rules table shows min/max ciro and iskonto percentage ✓
/iskonto - [data-testid=add-rule-btn] opens modal for admin to add rules ✓
Sidebar - All 8 nav items under 'Ana menü' with active states, no 'Yakında' badges ✓
regression_tests: Dashboard - 4 stat cards, scan bar, critical stock widget, recent orders widget ✓
Orders page - table with order details and status badges ✓
All 53 backend tests pass (30 original + 6 CSV + 17 new) ✓
